creator: kristinacors
caption: Comment “New York City” and I’ll send you the link to shop my 7 day NYC itinerary filled with tons of hidden gems I’ve discovered as a New Yorker over the years. Also it’s not a list of places, each day is planned out and organized by neighborhood so you’re not wasting time or money going from one side of the city to the other! It’s designed to save you time and money so you don’t miss out on the magic of New York City! #travelbucketlist #nycitinerary #thingstodoinnyc #nyctraveltips #nychiddengems
